subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath reserved for the promulgation of the Covenant! Thou hast recited the words of unity and the tokens of detachment, and hast chanted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ادخره الله لنشر المیثاق قد تلوت کلمات التوحید و آثار التجرید و رتلت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @call to action
